validation_sql_preview.option_a_same_joins_select_all: SELECT * FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG T LEFT JOIN CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG S ON T.SRC_STM_ID = S.SRC_STM_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN CCAL_REPL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP LK ON LK.CCAL_PD_ID = S.CCAL_PD_ID AND LK.ACTV_F = 'Y'
validation_sql_preview.option_b_projection_validation: SELECT T.SRC_STM_ID, S.SRC_STM_CODE, LK.CCAL_PD_ID FROM CDS_STG_OWNER.STCCCALQ_STG T LEFT JOIN CCAL_REPL_OWNER.STCCCALQ_GG S ON T.SRC_STM_ID = S.SRC_STM_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN CCAL_REPL_OWNER.CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP LK ON LK.CCAL_PD_ID = S.CCAL_PD_ID AND LK.ACTV_F = 'Y'
